band_rationale: Medium: localized defects — one OpenSpec requirement with no scenario, vague wording ('simple') inside a requirement, and a proposal missing its Impact section (the latter costs score via a required-section finding that carries no pitfall id). Ceiling 97 requires the defects to keep costing at least 3 overall points; floor 86 leaves room for severity re-tuning. Engine output at labeling time: 93.6.
note: OpenSpec-layout case (#57): a change directory (proposal + tasks + delta spec) auto-detected by the OpenSpec adapter through the same discovery path the CLI uses. The 'Digest opt-out' requirement has no #### Scenario; the proposal omits '## Impact' (scored, but reported without a pitfall id, so it is asserted via the score band rather than expect_pitfalls).
